'''bagadha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:bright|bright]]".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-g-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:bright|bright]]
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:bogadhithi|bogadhithi]] || [[word:bogadhiji|bogadhiji]] || [[word:bogadhishi|bogadhishi]] || [[word:bogadhiki|bogadhiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:bogadhuthuthu|bogadhuthuthu]] || [[word:bogadhujuju|bogadhujuju]] || [[word:bogadhushushu|bogadhushushu]] || [[word:bogadhukuku|bogadhukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:bogadhuthu|bogadhuthu]] || [[word:bogadhuju|bogadhuju]] || [[word:bogadhushu|bogadhushu]] || [[word:bogadhuku|bogadhuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:bogadhufthuf|bogadhufthuf]] || [[word:bogadhufjuf|bogadhufjuf]] || [[word:bogadhufshuf|bogadhufshuf]] || [[word:bogadhufkuf|bogadhufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:bogadhethe|bogadhethe]] || [[word:bogadheje|bogadheje]] || [[word:bogadheshe|bogadheshe]] || [[word:bogadheke|bogadheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:bogadhothotho|bogadhothotho]] || [[word:bogadhojojo|bogadhojojo]] || [[word:bogadhoshosho|bogadhoshosho]] || [[word:bogadhokoko|bogadhokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:bogadhotho|bogadhotho]] || [[word:bogadhojo|bogadhojo]] || [[word:bogadhosho|bogadhosho]] || [[word:bogadhoko|bogadhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:bogadhofthof|bogadhofthof]] || [[word:bogadhofjof|bogadhofjof]] || [[word:bogadhofshof|bogadhofshof]] || [[word:bogadhofkof|bogadhofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:bogadhĂŻfthĂŻf|bogadhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:bogadhĂŻfjĂŻf|bogadhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:bogadhĂŻfshĂŻf|bogadhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:bogadhĂŻfkĂŻf|bogadhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:bogadhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|bogadhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:bogadhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|bogadhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:bogadhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|bogadhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:bogadhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|bogadhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:bogadhĂŻfthĂŻf|bogadhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:bogadhĂŻfjĂŻf|bogadhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:bogadhĂŻfshĂŻf|bogadhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:bogadhĂŻfkĂŻf|bogadhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:bogadhĂŻfthĂŻf|bogadhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:bogadhĂŻfjĂŻf|bogadhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:bogadhĂŻfshĂŻf|bogadhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:bogadhĂŻfkĂŻf|bogadhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:bogadhĂŠthĂŠ|bogadhĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:bogadhĂŠjĂŠ|bogadhĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:bogadhĂŠshĂŠ|bogadhĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:bogadhĂŠkĂŠ|bogadhĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:bogadhathatha|bogadhathatha]] || [[word:bogadhajaja|bogadhajaja]] || [[word:bogadhashasha|bogadhashasha]] || [[word:bogadhakaka|bogadhakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:bogadhatha|bogadhatha]] || [[word:bogadhaja|bogadhaja]] || [[word:bogadhasha|bogadhasha]] || [[word:bogadhaka|bogadhaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:bogadhafthaf|bogadhafthaf]] || [[word:bogadhafjaf|bogadhafjaf]] || [[word:bogadhafshaf|bogadhafshaf]] || [[word:bogadhafkaf|bogadhafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:bogadhasha|bogadhasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:bogadhshĂ«sha|bogadhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bogadhrosha|bogadhrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bogadhmusha|bogadhmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:bogadhyasha|bogadhyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobogadhnkshĂ«sha|gobogadhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobogadhnkrosha|gobogadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobogadhnkmusha|gobogadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobogadhnkyasha|gobogadhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:bogagadhasha|bogagadhasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:bogagadhshĂ«sha|bogagadhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bogagadhrosha|bogagadhrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bogagadhmusha|bogagadhmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:bogagadhyasha|bogagadhyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobogagadhnkshĂ«sha|gobogagadhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobogagadhnkrosha|gobogagadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobogagadhnkmusha|gobogagadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobogagadhnkyasha|gobogagadhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:begĂŠdhasha|begĂŠdhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:begĂŠdhshĂ«sha|begĂŠdhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:begĂŠdhrosha|begĂŠdhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:begĂŠdhmusha|begĂŠdhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:begĂŠdhyasha|begĂŠdhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobegĂŠdhnkshĂ«sha|gobegĂŠdhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobegĂŠdhnkrosha|gobegĂŠdhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobegĂŠdhnkmusha|gobegĂŠdhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobegĂŠdhnkyasha|gobegĂŠdhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:bogfadhasha|bogfadhasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:bogfadhshĂ«sha|bogfadhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bogfadhrosha|bogfadhrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bogfadhmusha|bogfadhmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:bogfadhyasha|bogfadhyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobogfadhnkshĂ«sha|gobogfadhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobogfadhnkrosha|gobogfadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobogfadhnkmusha|gobogfadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobogfadhnkyasha|gobogfadhnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|654f723}}
